title: Caramelized Egg Roll Blossom
description: A floral and velvety Japanese dish featuring egg roll wrappers that have been caramelized for a diabetic-friendly dessert option.

ingredients.name: 1 cup gluten-free egg roll wrappers
ingredients.notes: Ensure wrappers are cooked before proceeding.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup water
ingredients.notes: To help the sugar dissolve and caramelize smoothly.

instructions: Gently warm the egg roll wrappers in a pan over low heat for about 2 minutes per side, until golden brown.
Arrange the caramelized egg rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and let them cool slightly.
In a small saucepan, combine coconut sugar and water. Stir gently to dissolve the sugar completely before adding butter.
Stir continuously over medium heat until the mixture turns into a rich amber color. This should take about 5-7 minutes, stirring frequently.
Pour the caramel sauce evenly over each egg roll wrapper and let it sit for 30 seconds before serving.
